en.text: a primitive root (rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of H5394, H7997 and their congeners through the idea of extracting); to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death)

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root (rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of H5394, H7997 and their congeners through the idea of extracting); to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death)
